title: Python Foundations
description: Learn Python syntax, variables, loops, functions, data structures, and practical programming.

title: Python for Data Analysis
description: Analyse structured datasets using Python, pandas, NumPy, data cleaning, and exploratory analysis.

title: Machine Learning Foundations
description: Understand supervised learning, unsupervised learning, training, testing, features, models, and evaluation.

title: Classification Algorithms
description: Build classification models using logistic regression, decision trees, random forests, SVM, KNN, and Naive Bayes.

title: Regression Algorithms
description: Predict continuous outcomes using linear regression, regularization, tree regression, and ensemble methods.

title: Clustering and Segmentation
description: Discover groups using K-Means, DBSCAN, hierarchical clustering, and customer segmentation techniques.

title: Anomaly Detection
description: Detect unusual records using Isolation Forest, local outlier methods, anomaly scores, and threshold analysis.

title: Principal Component Analysis
description: Reduce feature dimensions using PCA, explained variance, component loadings, and reconstruction analysis.

title: Time-Series Forecasting
description: Forecast chronological data using ARIMA, SARIMA, exponential smoothing, Prophet, and temporal validation.

title: XGBoost for Structured Data
description: Develop high-performance gradient-boosted tree models using feature engineering, tuning, and interpretation.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: Process human language using tokenization, text cleaning, TF-IDF, classification, and document analysis.

title: Semantic Search and Embeddings
description: Build semantic retrieval systems using vector embeddings, cosine similarity, indexing, and document search.

title: Large Language Model Applications
description: Build applications with large language models, prompts, structured outputs, tool use, and API integration.

title: Retrieval-Augmented Generation
description: Create RAG pipelines combining document ingestion, embeddings, vector retrieval, and grounded generation.

title: Agentic AI Development
description: Design autonomous AI agents using goals, tools, memory, planning, reasoning, and workflow execution.

title: Multi-Agent Systems
description: Build multi-agent architectures with specialized roles, coordination, communication, and task orchestration.

title: FastAPI for AI Applications
description: Deploy machine-learning and AI functionality through FastAPI endpoints, validation, and REST services.

title: Database Systems with PostgreSQL
description: Design relational schemas, SQL queries, indexes, transactions, and PostgreSQL-backed applications.

title: Supabase Application Development
description: Build applications using Supabase PostgreSQL, authentication, storage, row-level security, and APIs.

title: Docker for AI Developers
description: Package AI applications using containers, Dockerfiles, images, environment variables, and deployment workflows.

title: Process Mining
description: Analyse event logs, reconstruct workflows, discover variants, and identify process bottlenecks.

title: Business Process Optimization
description: Improve enterprise workflows through root-cause analysis, metrics, process redesign, and digital transformation.

title: Data Visualization with Python
description: Communicate insights through Python charts, dashboards, statistical graphics, and visual storytelling.

title: Association-Rule Mining
description: Discover product relationships using Apriori, support, confidence, lift, and market-basket analysis.

title: Recommendation Systems
description: Build content-based, collaborative, matrix-factorization, and hybrid recommendation systems.

title: Model Evaluation and Validation
description: Evaluate models using train-test separation, cross-validation, classification metrics, regression metrics, and ranking metrics.

title: MLOps Foundations
description: Manage machine-learning lifecycles through versioning, model tracking, testing, deployment, and monitoring.

title: AI Product Development
description: Translate business problems into AI products through discovery, architecture, prototyping, evaluation, and deployment.

title: Digital Transformation Strategy
description: Plan digital transformation using process analysis, technology roadmaps, governance, and change management.

title: Responsible and Explainable AI
description: Study model explainability, fairness, privacy, governance, risk management, and responsible AI deployment.
